name: 40W LED Canopy Light Motion Sensor AC 120-277V 5000K
description: Illuminate your outdoor spaces efficiently with our 40W LED Canopy Lights from ZION LED USA, Equipped with a built-in motion sensor for enhanced energy savings and security. With a crisp 5000K color temperature and high efficacy of 140 lumens per watt, this surface-mounted fixture delivers bright, reliable illumination—perfect for parking garages, carports, and building entrances. Designed to replace traditional 150–250W metal halide or high-pressure sodium lights, it offers a modern, energy-efficient upgrade for various outdoor and low-bay applications.
short_desc: Features: Built-in Motion Sensor: Automatically turns the light on or off based on movement, reducing energy consumption and enhancing safety. High Efficiency: Delivers 140 lumens per watt for bright and cost-effective illumination. MH/HPS Equivalent: Replaces 150W–250W traditional fixtures, offering significant energy savings. Surface Mounted: Designed for easy installation on ceilings or overhangs. Durable Construction: Rugged build for reliable outdoor performance in all weather conditions. Color Temperature: 5000K daylight white for clear visibility. Applications: Parking Garages: Improves visibility and safety for vehicles and pedestrians. Carports: Enhances security and convenience with consistent lighting. Building Entrances: Welcomes visitors with bright, dependable light. Low Bay Lighting: Suitable for indoor areas with low ceilings requiring efficient lighting. Commercial Properties: Ideal for gas stations, retail stores, and similar environments.
